name: Dutch White Asparagus Recipe
description: One of the great things about spring menus is all the tender, fresh green vegetable dishes. Longstanding Midtown dining spot Michael's New York, owned by restaurateur Michael McCarty, boasts a Dutch recipe we had to try: citrus-steamed Dutch white asparagus (they actually do a mix of white and green) with a wine-spiked butter sauce, a…

recipeInstructions.text: After peeling and trimming the asparagus, steam it in citrus water — water with Meyer lemon, orange and grapefruit slices — until fork tender.
In a pot add the Chardonnay, white wine vinegar, thyme, shallots and chunk of Parmesan rind; reduce about a quarter.
Remove from heat and slowly whisk in cubes of butter until sauce is thick and glossy.
Pour 2 tablespoons of beurre blanc on a plate, top it with a poached egg, steamed white asparagus, prosciutto and grated Parmesan.
Goat Cheese And Asparagus Macaroni Salad Recipe
